reference: Hi, I am twenty-four years old. I have had an enlarged spleen for about eight months. I was also diagnosed with psychogenic tremor disorder a few months ago and have had it for about five months. Around three or four months ago, I would get up in the middle of the night with very severe stomach pain accompanied by nausea and dizziness. This has continued until now. I am noticing a lot of bruising on my legs, all over, and sometimes on my arms and buttocks. I still experience nausea without vomiting. All I want is to get better.
text: Hi, I am 24 years old. I have had an enlarged spleen for about 8 months. I was also diagnosed with psychogenic tremor disorder a few months ago and have had it for about 5 months. Around 3 or 4 months ago, I would get up in the middle of the night with severe stomach pain accompanied by nausea and dizziness. This has continued until now. I am noticing a lot of bruising on my legs, all over, and sometimes on my arms and buttocks. I still experience nausea without vomiting. All I want is to get better.
